name: allergy-input-field
title: Allergy Input Field
description: Add-allergy row producing severity-coded chips, with an explicit "No known allergies" state.

props.name: value / defaultValue
props.description: Controlled/uncontrolled state; AllergyEntry is { label, severity?, reaction? }.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires when an allergy is added/removed or NKA is toggled.

props.name: suggestions
props.description: Optional allergen names for the datalist typeahead.

clinicalNotes: "No known allergies" must be an explicit, recorded choice — an empty allergy list is not the same as confirmed none, so NKA is a distinct affirmative flag, and adding any allergy revokes it. Capture the reaction type (rash vs anaphylaxis) alongside severity, because it changes whether a drug is absolutely contraindicated or a documented caution. Severity may be left unspecified rather than guessed.
notes: Round-2 form component; composes allergy-badge + input + select + checkbox + field + button.
